title: panicum torreyi
intro: Panicum torreyi, also known as Torrey's panic grass, is a species of grass native to North America. It is a perennial grass that grows in wetland areas and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Panicum torreyi include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Panicum torreyi can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a topical ointment or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
